description: The function correctly combines two ordered versions streams.
The function correctly handles the case where both lists end together by not removing the last matching element.
When 'a' is less than 'b', 'a' is appended to the merged list.
When 'b' is less than 'a', 'b' is appended to the merged list.

conditions: merged and left and right and (merged[-1] == left[-1] == right[-1])
description: If the merged list, left list, and right list are not empty and the last elements of all three lists match, the last matching element is removed from the merged list.
